name: Microsoft Windows Boot Manager
cve-notes: Multiple pre-2024 Windows Boot Manager builds are revoked in the UEFI Revocation List (dbx) for CVE-2022-21894 (BlackLotus) and CVE-2023-24932 (Black Lotus follow-up). Verifiers should cross-reference image-hash-sha256 against the current UEFI RL.
notes: Windows boot chain: bootmgfw.efi → winload.efi → Windows kernel. Measured on PCR 4.
